---
output:
  xaringan::moon_reader:
    css: ["default", "extra.css"]
    lib_dir: libs
    seal: false
    nature:
      highlightStyle: github
      highlightLines: true
      countIncrementalSlides: false
      ratio: '16:9'
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}
##xaringan::inf_mr()
## For offline work: https://bookdown.org/yihui/rmarkdown/some-tips.html#working-offline
## Images not appearing? Put images folder inside the libs folder as that is the main data directory

library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
##library(stargazer)
library(kableExtra)
##library(modelr)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE,
                      eval = TRUE,
                      error = FALSE,
                      message = FALSE,
                      warning = FALSE,
                      comment = NA)
```

class: slideblue

.size80[**Today's Agenda**]

<br>

.size70[.center[

Welcome to the prisoner's dilemma (mark 2)

]]

<br>

.center[.size40[
  Justin Leinaweaver (Spring 2022)
]]

???

## Prep for Class
1. Reserve the extra room(s)

2. Print your notes
    - Game table and tracking sheet
    - Have leaders make a list of all members of their group at beginning of exercise (that will be what they use for distributing benefits)
    - You'll need to record leadership points every two rounds

<br> 

### Old Approach
Enough so majority of winning group can get 5 or whole group gets fewer

- Number in class / 2 = Group size
- (Group size / 2) + 1 = Group majority
- Group majority * 5 = Game reward




---

class: middle, slideblue

.size50[.center[**A Competitive Prisoner's Dilemma**]]

<br>

.size40[
+ A single game played across multiple rounds.

+ Each round your group must choose whether to cooperate or defect.

+ Your reward depends on the choice made by the other group.
]

???

Today we replay our prisoners' dilemma game from week four but with a few newly added wrinkles.

<br>

Just like last time we have three basic rules:

- A single game played across multiple rounds.

- Each round your group must choose whether to cooperate or defect.

- Your reward depends on the choice made by the other group.

<br>

*split the class in half*

Stand up and move to the opposite sides of the room.



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/10_1-Switzerland_Biden_Putin.jpg')
background-size: 90%
background-position: center

.center[.size45[.content-box-red[**Prisoner's Dilemma (v2)**]]]

???

Today's PD game has been updated to add additional elements that are crucial to thinking about international political events.

- Each group is a democratic country with a soon to be elected leader.

- Each round of the game is a negotiation between the two leaders with a goal of bringing points back to their groups.

### Make sense so far?



---

class: middle, center

.size50[.center[.content-box-blue[**Prisoner's Dilemma (v2)**]]]

<br>

```{css, echo=F}
/* Change the background color to white for shaded rows (even rows) */
.remark-slide thead, .remark-slide tr:nth-child(2n) {
      background-color: white;
}
```

```{r}
tibble(
  col1 = c("Group 1", ""),
  col2 = c("Cooperate", "Defect"),
  Cooperate = c("+3, +3", "+5, -2"),
  Defect = c("-2, +5", "-1, -1")
) |>
  kbl(align = c("l", "l", "c", "c"), col.names = c("", "", "Cooperate", "Defect")) |>
  add_header_above(c(" " = 2, "Group 2" = 2)) |>
  column_spec(column = 1:2, bold = TRUE, width = "20em") |>
  column_spec(column = 3:4, background = "#b3ccff", width = "20em") |>
  kable_styling(font_size = 40, bootstrap_options = "basic")
```

???

Here you can see I've updated the outcomes table since the last time we played.

### Everybody still clear on how to read this game board?

The table shows four possible outcomes for each round based on the choice made by each group.

### Any questions on the game board?

<br>

The reward: Bonus points on the final exam

We will play seven rounds.

<br>

Let's talk about the leaders.



---

class: middle, slideblue

.pull-left[
.size45[.center[**Your Fearless Leader**]]

.size40[
+ Elected (50% + 1)

+ Negotiates

+ Distributes All Rewards

+ Receives Personal Benefits
]]

.pull-right[
```{r, fig.align='right', fig.retina=3}
knitr::include_graphics('libs/Images/09_1-skipper.jpg')
```
]

???

- Elected by a simple majority,

- Empowered to negotiate with the other leader (if they choose),

- Distributes all points received by the country, and

- Receives a personal benefit for being the leader.
    - Every two rounds you survive as leader you will receive +3 points all for you (cannot be redistributed)
    
<br>

### Any questions on the powers of the leader?

It's good to be the king.



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/09_1-voting.png')
background-size: 93%
background-position: bottom

.size45[.center[**Your Fearless (and TEMPORARY) Leader**]]

???

As I said, you are each a democracy.

Your first job will be to elect a leader using a simple majority rule (50% + 1).

And because you are a democracy, you may replace the leader by a simple vote at any point during the game.

### Any questions on this?


---

class: middle, center

.size50[.center[.content-box-blue[**Prisoner's Dilemma (v2)**]]]

<br>

```{css, echo=F}
/* Change the background color to white for shaded rows (even rows) */
.remark-slide thead, .remark-slide tr:nth-child(2n) {
      background-color: white;
}
```

```{r}
tibble(
  col1 = c("Group 1", ""),
  col2 = c("Cooperate", "Defect"),
  Cooperate = c("+3, +3", "+5, -2"),
  Defect = c("-2, +5", "-1, -1")
) |>
  kbl(align = c("l", "l", "c", "c"), col.names = c("", "", "Cooperate", "Defect")) |>
  add_header_above(c(" " = 2, "Group 2" = 2)) |>
  column_spec(column = 1:2, bold = TRUE, width = "20em") |>
  column_spec(column = 3:4, background = "#b3ccff", width = "20em") |>
  kable_styling(font_size = 40, bootstrap_options = "basic")
```

???

### Any questions before we start playing?

Ok, group A to 307, group B to 313 down the hall.

When you get there:

1. pick your leader,

2. Leaders take a census (e.g. make a list of all citizens in your country), and 

3. Get ready for round 1 of 7.

<br>

*Leaders negotiate together privately*

*At end of game return to 301*

<br>

ALL back to room 301



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/09_1-patronage.jpg')
background-size: 83%
background-position: center

???

Alright leaders, you have a list of your citizens and the points you received from the negotiation.

On Wednesday I want you to announce how you will be distributing the spoils.
